ksa_text: Design enterprise information architecture and systems to support organizational objectives, including alignment of data architecture with business strategy and capability delivery.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop a data management strategy that helps to prioritize investments and resource allocations (e.g., data analytics, data infrastructure).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Develop a data management strategy that helps to prioritize investments and resource allocations (e.g., data analytics, data infrastructure).

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-T-002 (Data Governance/Task) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.463, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.463). Domain prior: edge. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 1. Seniority: appropriate. Data marketplace operations: data product listing, discovery, subscription management, marketplace platform administration, pricing models, and data exchange facilitation.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.463, and Data Governance (DG) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Data Governance KSA (composite 0.463)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Data Marketplace Manager job postings does not surface this Data Governance competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
